parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ points: [{ id: $json.vector_uuid, vector: $json.embedding, payload: { doc_id: $json.doc_id, chunk_index: $json.chunk_index, chunk_text: $json.chunk_text, document_type: $json.document_type, process_line: $json.process_line, access_roles: $json.access_roles, revision_number: $json.revision_number, file_name: $json.file_name } }] }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO document_chunks
(doc_id, chunk_index, chunk_text, token_count, vector_id, vector_index)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
RETURNING doc_id, chunk_index, vector_index;

INSERT INTO document_metadata (doc_id, file_name, document_type, process_line, access_roles, revision_status, revision_number, previous_revision_id, chunk_count, vector_index, ingested_by) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5::text[], 'active', $6, (SELECT doc_id FROM document_metadata WHERE doc_id = $7::uuid LIMIT 1), 0, $3, $8) ON CONFLICT (doc_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING doc_id;
UPDATE document_metadata SET revision_status = 'superseded', updated_at = NOW() WHERE doc_id = '{{ $json.previous_revision_id }}' AND revision_status = 'active' RETURNING doc_id;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, doc_id: $('Aggregate_Chunks').item.json.doc_id, file_name: $('Aggregate_Chunks').item.json.file_name, document_type: $('Aggregate_Chunks').item.json.document_type, chunk_count: $('Aggregate_Chunks').item.json.chunk_count, revision_number: $('Aggregate_Chunks').item.json.revision_number, latency_seconds: $('Compute_Ingestion_Metrics').item.json._latency_seconds }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO security_audit_log (event_type, user_id, details) VALUES ('ingestion_failure', 'system', '{{ JSON.stringify({ error: $json.error_message, stage: $json.error_stage, node: $json.error_node, execution_id: $json.execution_id }) }}'::jsonb);
